description: Calibration fixture for Gemma4-31B dense sliding-window attention on Rapid-MLX.

test_cases.measurement_command: cd ~/.rapid-mlx && RAPID_MLX_METRICS=1 python -m vllm_mlx.serve --model mlx-community/gemma-4-31b-it-4bit --kv-cache-dtype int4 --max-model-len 16384 --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000 2>&1 | tee run.log; lsof -n -P -p $(pgrep -f gemma-4-31b) | grep -i memory
test_cases.hardware: Apple M5 Max, 128 GB unified memory, macOS 26.0

error_bounds.notes: Sliding-window: global layers (20) store full context with global_head_dim=512; local layers (30) use 1024-token window with head_dim=256. Higher per-layer overhead due to per-layer-input embeddings.

test_cases.measurement_command: cd ~/.rapid-mlx && RAPID_MLX_METRICS=1 python -m vllm_mlx.serve --model mlx-community/gemma-4-31b-it-4bit --kv-cache-dtype int8 --max-model-len 16384 --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000 2>&1 | tee run.log; lsof -n -P -p $(pgrep -f gemma-4-31b) | grep -i memory
test_cases.hardware: Apple M5 Max, 128 GB unified memory, macOS 26.0

error_bounds.notes: int8 KV doubles cache size. Global layers use wider heads (512) so KV growth is asymmetric vs local layers.

test_cases.measurement_command: cd ~/.rapid-mlx && RAPID_MLX_METRICS=1 python -m vllm_mlx.serve --model mlx-community/gemma-4-31b-it-4bit --kv-cache-dtype int4 --max-model-len 131072 --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000 2>&1 | tee run.log; lsof -n -P -p $(pgrep -f gemma-4-31b) | grep -i memory
test_cases.hardware: Apple M5 Max, 128 GB unified memory, macOS 26.0

error_bounds.notes: At 128K, global layers dominate KV (full context). Local layers bounded by 1024-token window. This is the key calibration point for Gemma4 scaling. CRITICAL: never set local_attn_window on DeltaNet — Gemma4 uses sliding-window, not hybrid attention.

cross_surface_equality_check.description: For each test_case, wizard/preset/setup-view/models surfaces must show identical MemoryBreakdown when called with matching parameters.
cross_surface_equality_check.verification: Run /api/vram-estimate with identical body for each scenario; diff active_kv_bytes, retained_kv_bytes, total_bytes across all surfaces.

phase_5a_hard_gate_notes.no_llama_kv_vocabulary: Rapid-MLX estimates use bf16/int8/int4 only. No q8_0/q4_0/ctk/ctv strings.
phase_5a_hard_gate_notes.active_retained_distinct: active_kv_bytes and retained_kv_bytes are separate components, never merged.
phase_5a_hard_gate_notes.turboquant_on_retained_only: TurboQuant savings apply ONLY to retained_kv_bytes when qualified.
phase_5a_hard_gate_notes.unknown_fineturns_not_qualified: Finetunes of Gemma4 without explicit qualification → TurboQuant Disabled.
